Subject: RE: Account access issue — ticket #8821

Dear Robert Lee,

Thank you for reaching out to Pinnacle Investment Services Ltd.
We have resolved the access issue with your account (ID: RBL-0042).

Our engineer Sarah Kim has verified that your two-factor authentication
was temporarily disabled due to a system update on 7 April. It has now
been re-enabled.

If you need further assistance, please call our dedicated line at
(800) 555-0174 or reply to this email. You can also reach the
compliance team directly at compliance@pinnacle-inv.com.

Kind regards,
Mark Thompson
Client Services Manager
Pinnacle Investment Services Ltd
mark.thompson@pinnacle-inv.com
Direct: 212-555-0831
